mapper.select: SELECT GHP_ID ghpId, GHP_NAME ghpName, GHP_CATEGORY ghpCategory, GHP_STANDARD ghpStandard, GHP_CHECK_METHOD ghpCheckMethod, GHP_CYCLE ghpCycle, GHP_WH_TYPE ghpWhType, GHP_WP_TYPE ghpWpType, GHP_MIN_VALUE ghpMinValue, GHP_MAX_VALUE ghpMaxValue, GHP_UNIT ghpUnit FROM GHP WHERE GHP_USAGE = 'Y' AND GHP_WP_TYPE = #{wpTypeNo} ORDER BY GHP_ID

SELECT GHP_ID ghpId, GHP_NAME ghpName, GHP_CATEGORY ghpCategory, GHP_STANDARD ghpStandard, GHP_CHECK_METHOD ghpCheckMethod, GHP_CYCLE ghpCycle, GHP_WH_TYPE ghpWhType, GHP_WP_TYPE ghpWpType, GHP_MIN_VALUE ghpMinValue, GHP_MAX_VALUE ghpMaxValue, GHP_UNIT ghpUnit FROM GHP WHERE GHP_USAGE = 'Y' AND GHP_WH_TYPE = #{whTypeNo} ORDER BY GHP_ID

SELECT GHP_ID ghpId, GHP_NAME ghpName, GHP_CATEGORY ghpCategory, GHP_STANDARD ghpStandard, GHP_CHECK_METHOD ghpCheckMethod, GHP_CYCLE ghpCycle, GHP_WH_TYPE ghpWhType, GHP_WP_TYPE ghpWpType, GHP_MIN_VALUE ghpMinValue, GHP_MAX_VALUE ghpMaxValue, GHP_UNIT ghpUnit FROM GHP WHERE GHP_USAGE = 'Y' AND GHP_ID = #{ghpId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'GLOG' || GLOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO GHP_LOG ( GLOG_ID, GLOG_GHP, GLOG_DATE, GLOG_WORKER, GLOG_VALUE, GLOG_RESULT, GLOG_ACTION, GLOG_ADATE, GLOG_IMG, GLOG_MEMO, GLOG_CDATE, GLOG_WHID, GLOG_WPID) VALUES ( #{glogId}, #{ghpId}, #{glogDate}, #{glogWorker}, #{glogValue}, #{glogResult}, #{glogAction}, #{glogAdate}, null , #{glogMemo}, sysdate + (9/24), #{glogWhId}, #{glogWpId} )
mapper.select: SELECT glog.glog_id glogId, glog.glog_date glogDate, glog.glog_worker glogWorker, E.emp_name glogWName, glog.glog_value glogValue, glog.glog_result glogResult, glog.glog_action glogAction, glog.glog_adate glogAdate, glog.glog_img glogImg, glog.glog_memo glogMemo, glog.glog_cdate glogCdate, glog.glog_whid glogWhId, wh.wh_name glogWhName, glog.glog_wpid glogWpId, wp.wp_name glogWpName, ghp.ghp_id ghpId, ghp.ghp_name ghpName, ghp.ghp_category ghpCategory, ghp.ghp_standard ghpStandard, ghp.ghp_check_method ghpCheckMethod, ghp.ghp_cycle ghpCycle, ghp.ghp_wh_type ghpWhType, ghp.ghp_wp_type ghpWpType, ghp.GHP_MIN_VALUE ghpMinValue, ghp.GHP_MAX_VALUE ghpMaxValue, ghp.ghp_unit ghpUnit FROM ghp_log glog LEFT OUTER JOIN GHP ghp ON glog.GLOG_GHP = ghp.GHP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP E ON glog.GLOG_WORKER = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN WORKPLACE wp ON wp.wp_id = glog.glog_wpid LEFT OUTER JOIN WAREHOUSE wh ON wh.wh_id = glog.glog_whid WHERE upper(glog.glog_id) = upper(#{glogId}) and glog.glog_usage = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE GHP_LOG SET GLOG_USAGE = 'N' WHERE upper(GLOG_ID) = upper(#{glogId})

UPDATE GHP_LOG SET GLOG_DATE = #{glogDate}, GLOG_VALUE = #{glogValue}, GLOG_RESULT = #{glogResult}, GLOG_ACTION = #{glogAction}, GLOG_ADATE = #{glogAdate}, GLOG_MEMO = #{glogMemo} WHERE GLOG_ID = #{glogId}
